behaviors.description: The embedding vector produced for a given query string has the correct dimensionality for the vector database index.
behaviors.justification: Pass 1 dependency: real embedding-provider output shape at runtime. A stub can be set to the expected size and miss real config/model drift. REAL-INFRA applies because this behavior is about the produced vector from the actual embedding call. Rejected higher level Agentic/Workflow: behavior checks dimensionality only, not model judgment quality or multi-agentic sequencing.
behaviors.test_description: Call the real embedding endpoint with a fixed query, then validate returned vector length exactly matches the live index dimension configured in the vector DB; fail on mismatch.

behaviors.description: The similarity search returns results ordered by descending cosine similarity score.
behaviors.justification: Pass 1 dependency: module handoff between search service and vector-store adapter/query parameters. This is not pure single-function logic if ordering can break at the boundary. No required real OS/network/subprocess to expose core bug; local wired modules with deterministic vectors are sufficient. Rejected System: behavior text does not require real network conditions or external infra semantics.
behaviors.test_description: Seed a local test index with known vectors, run similarity search through the service layer, and assert returned items are monotonically non-increasing by cosine score.

behaviors.description: The LLM re-ranking step changes the order of at least some results compared to the raw similarity ranking when the query has nuanced intent.
behaviors.justification: Pass 1 dependency: real model judgment quality for nuanced intent. MOCK-HIDE applies: deterministic stubbed reranker can trivially reorder and falsely pass without proving semantic relevance behavior. Rejected Workflow: behavior scopes to one agentic rerank step, not validating a multi-agentic chain end-to-end.
behaviors.test_description: Provide a nuanced query plus a fixed candidate list where lexical similarity conflicts with intent, call the real reranker multiple runs, and assert at least one stable position change from raw ranking within acceptance criteria.

behaviors.description: A query with no close matches in the database returns an empty result set rather than low-relevance noise.
behaviors.justification: Pass 1 dependency: relevance cutoff correctness against real embedding-space behavior (AI/ML output characteristics). With mocked vectors, separation is often artificial and may hide false-positive noise seen with real embeddings. Rejected Workflow: this behavior is about one decision boundary (empty vs noisy results), not a required multi-agentic sequence assertion.
behaviors.test_description: Using real embeddings and real similarity search settings, submit out-of-domain queries against a curated corpus with known non-matches and assert API returns empty results (or below-threshold none) consistently.

behaviors.description: The end-to-end latency from receiving the query to returning re-ranked results stays below 2 seconds for the median case.
behaviors.justification: Pass 1 dependency: full pipeline timing across sequential embedding + vector search + LLM rerank steps. This is both real infra and multiple agentic steps; lower-level tests with mocks hide true latency distribution. Rejected Agentic-only: behavior explicitly measures end-to-end across the whole chain, not a single model call.
behaviors.test_description: Run a representative load sample through the live API path with real embedding and reranking services, collect end-to-end latencies, and assert p50 < 2.0s for the median-case query mix.
